nasb.text: Its streams will be turned into pitch, And its loose earth into brimstone, And its land will become burning pitch.

esv.text: And the streams of Edom shall be turned into pitch, and her soil into sulfur; her land shall become burning pitch.

cnv.text: 以東的河水都要變成石油， 它的塵土必變成硫磺， 它的地土要變成燒著的石油，

ccb.text: 以东的河流要变为沥青， 土壤要变成硫磺， 大地要成为燃烧的沥青，

csbs.text: 以东的溪流将变成柏油， 它的尘土将变成硫磺， 它的土地将成为燃烧着的柏油——
